description: update() moves + wall-bounces the ball, steers the paddle, bounces off the paddle (+10), removes hit bricks (+10 each), loses a life and resets the ball on the floor, and freezes when isGameOver — all in one frame.
Builds and returns a brand-new state object (keys in order ball, paddle, bricks, score, lives) instead of mutating the state it was handed.
Calls step, bounce, movePaddle, overlaps, ballBox, removeHit, addScore, loseLife, isGameOver instead of re-writing them; clear and readable.
